# Sedimentary Architecture

**Summary**: The spatial and temporal arrangement of sedimentary bodies.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-butt|Butt, 2023]] analyzed the depositional architecture of the Al Wajh Formation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-butt|Butt, 2023]] determines the connectivity and distribution of reservoir units.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-butt|Butt, 2023]] 3D modeling and field mapping

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Architecture was influenced by fault-controlled subbasins (Sukk, Ifal, Maqna-1, Maqna-2). ([[2023-butt|Butt, 2023, p. 36]])
